## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Safety and scope

- [ ] No firmware offset is presented as universal.
- [ ] No automatic UEFI/NVRAM-variable write was added.
- [ ] No third-party executable, private firmware dump, service tag, or BitLocker material was committed.
- [ ] Windows PowerShell 5.1 compatibility was preserved or the compatibility change is documented.
- [ ] Tests and documentation were updated.

## Validation

List the commands and environments used to validate the change.
